focus: Belgium tax-benefit surface with federal, Brussels, Flemish, Walloon, and community-layer coverage

national.description: Federal/national Belgium statutes, regulations, and agency policy surfaces.

regional.description: Brussels-Capital Region and Common Community Commission surfaces.
Flemish Region and Flemish Community surfaces where competence is integrated in Flemish institutions.

community.description: German-speaking Community surfaces promoted after Moniteur/ELI source discovery.
French Community, COCOF, VGC, and COCOM namespaces are added when source manifests promote those competences.

purpose: Machine-readable intake map from Belgium tax-benefit tracks to upstream official source families, comparison references, and first RuleSpec encoding batches.
source_priority: Moniteur belge / Belgisch Staatsblad original publications and ELI Moniteur links
Justel consolidated legislation only as a non-authentic locator
Agency rate tables, manuals, calculators, and guidance after upstream law identification
Pinned executable household-level comparison references for parity and regression tests; aggregate simulators and documentation are supporting benchmarks only

current_blockers.description: OpenFisca Belgium is only a candidate and was not found as a GitHub country package or PyPI distribution on 2026-07-01; BELMOD and EUROMOD Belgium still need executable household-case access and concrete version pins before parity checks.

FANTASI can only be used as an executable personal-income-tax oracle if access to the runnable Stata do-files plus permitted IPCAL or synthetic input data is obtained; public references are documentary only.

Council Regulation (EC) No 2866/98 is the upstream legal source for the Belgian franc to euro conversion rate, but EUR-Lex and Publications Office direct document endpoints returned WAF/403 responses to shell/corpus fetches on 2026-07-01; do not encode the LGAF third-and-later BEF birth grant until an official EU document can be fetched into corpus.

resolved_blockers.resolution: axiom-corpus branch codex/be-eli-corpus-20260630 adds extract-belgian-eli and manifest manifests/be-tax-benefit-eli.yaml; rerun 2026-06-30-be-tax-benefit wrote 3,304 Belgium and regional source provisions with complete coverage, including official Flemish and Walloon family-benefit decree article bodies, 1981/1980 social-security source additions, the 1994 coordinated health-insurance law article slices, its 3 July 1996 implementing decree, Royal Decree No. 38 self-employed social-status articles, Royal Decree No. 33 invalidity/prepension withholding instruments, Royal Decree No. 50 worker pension provisions, and the 23 December 1996 worker-pension implementing decree.
Official-document manifests now snapshot current CIR 1992 and VAT AR 20 consolidated PDFs into corpus runs 2026-06-30-be-income-tax-consolidated and 2026-06-30-be-vat-consolidated.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-excise-official-documents.yaml snapshots current consolidated alcohol, tobacco, and energy-product excise statutes into corpus run 2026-06-30-be-excise-consolidated with article-level rate provisions.
Official-document manifest manifests/be-vat-code-official-documents.yaml snapshots the current VAT Code article 41 and article 44 exemption text into corpus run 2026-06-30-be-vat-code-consolidated.

Official Brussels Fiscality MyTax road-tax tariff page is snapshotted in corpus run 2026-06-30-be-bru-vehicle-tax-guidance and exposes detailed car and motorcycle TMC tables valid from 1 July 2025 through 30 June 2026; RuleSpec module be-bru/statutes/vehicle_tax/entry_into_service_detailed.yaml encodes those tables.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-vlg-fiscal-code-official-documents.yaml snapshots current Vlaamse Codex Fiscaliteit article-version JSON for Flemish inheritance-tax article 2.7.4.1.1, gift-tax article 2.8.4.1.1, immovable-withholding articles 2.1.4.0.1 and 2.1.5.0.1, and vehicle-tax articles 2.2.4.0.1, 2.2.4.0.4, 2.2.4.0.5, 2.3.4.1.1, 2.3.4.1.2/1, 2.3.4.1.3, and 2.3.5.0.1 into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-vlg-fiscal-code with 24 provisions and complete coverage.

Official-document manifests snapshot SPF Finances FisconetPlus article JSON for Brussels and Walloon inheritance/gift tax rate articles into corpus runs 2026-07-01-be-bru-transfer-tax and 2026-07-01-be-wal-transfer-tax with complete coverage.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-wal-vehicle-tax-official-documents.yaml snapshots Moniteur ELI publication bodies for the Walloon TMC decrees of 7 September 2023 and 30 May 2025, the Wallex current vehicle-tax locator, the SPW Finances 2026-2027 indexed passenger-car TMC table, and the SPW Finances 2026-2027 annual circulation-tax PDF into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-wal-vehicle-tax with 10 provisions and complete coverage.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-dg-family-benefits-official-documents.yaml snapshots the German-speaking Community 23 April 2018 family-benefits decree from Moniteur and the current Justel locator into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-dg-family-benefits with 4 provisions and complete coverage.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-guaranteed-family-benefits-official-documents.yaml snapshots the 25 October 1971 guaranteed-family-benefits implementing royal decree from the Moniteur original publication PDF and current Justel locator into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-guaranteed-family-benefits with 3 provisions and complete coverage; the 20 July 1971 statute article slices were already present in corpus run 2026-06-30-be-tax-benefit.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-lgaf-family-allowance-amounts-official-documents.yaml snapshots the 19 December 1939 LGAF original Moniteur publication image and current Justel article ranges for Articles 40, 41, 42, 42bis, 44, 44ter, 50bis, 73bis, 73quater, and 76bis into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-lgaf-family-allowance-amounts with 12 provisions and complete coverage.

Official-document manifest manifests/be-dg-family-benefits-2025-amendments-official-documents.yaml snapshots the German-speaking Community program decree of 22 December 2025 from the Moniteur publication into corpus run 2026-07-01-be-dg-family-benefits-2025-amendments with 2 provisions and complete coverage; block 1 contains article 17 extending the family-benefit indexation freeze through 2027 and article 18 inserting the 62.55 EUR 2025 annual supplement.
